summary: Iteration 12 testing complete. AI Assistant features fully functional. Dashboard Assistant shows insights, highest risk property, urgent actions, missing records, and natural language queries work correctly. Property Assistant shows compliance score, recommended actions, and pending tasks.
passed_tests: Backend: Demo mode creates account with 3 properties
Backend: Insights summary has correct fields (total_properties, total_records, etc.)
Backend: Highest risk property identified correctly
Backend: Urgent actions returned with priority and property info
Backend: Missing compliance by property identified
Backend: Property insights 404 for invalid property ID
Backend: Ask question about properties works
Backend: Ask question about tasks works
Backend: Compliance records endpoint still works
Frontend: Dashboard AI Assistant panel loads
Frontend: Highest Risk card shows Edinburgh Old Town Flat
Frontend: Urgent Actions section shows Renew Insurance, Renew EICR
Frontend: Missing Records section shows all 3 properties
Frontend: Input field and Send button functional
Frontend: Suggested question click triggers LLM response
Frontend: Property Assistant panel loads on property detail
Frontend: Mobile layout - Dashboard Assistant visible
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration12_ai_assistant.py - Created comprehensive test suite for AI Assistant

test_credentials.demo_mode: No credentials needed - creates temporary account automatically via 'Try Demo Mode' button

seed_data_creation: Demo mode creates 3 UK properties (Victoria Terrace Apartment, Cotswold Cottage, Edinburgh Old Town Flat), 12 compliance records with mixed statuses, 6 tasks
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Assistant has two modes: 1) Structured insights (pure data queries - fast, shown in summary cards) and 2) Natural language (LLM-powered via GPT-4o) for freeform questions. Dashboard has 3-column grid with AI Assistant on left. Property detail page has PropertyAssistant panel after status summary. Email notifications remain MOCKED.

dashboard_ai_assistant.details: Compliance Assistant panel with: Highest Risk property card, Next Urgent Actions, Missing Records by property, Quick Questions, Input field with Send button

property_ai_assistant.details: AI Summary panel with: Compliance score (percentage), Quick stats (Compliant/Expiring/Overdue/Missing), Recommended Actions (clickable), Pending Tasks

natural_language_queries.details: GPT-4o powered responses grounded in user's actual data. Tested: 'What expires this month?', 'Which property has the most issues?', 'What tasks need attention?'

mobile_layout.details: Dashboard Assistant visible on mobile (390x844), stats cards stack properly

mocked_apis.email_notifications: Marked 'Coming soon' in UI - toggles save to DB but no actual emails sent
mocked_apis.contact_form_email: Form saves to DB but doesn't send actual email
